stemHtml: What is the correct order of a test transmission?

options.a: The identification of the station being called, the aircraft identification, the words “Radio Check”, the frequency being used.
options.b: The aircraft identification, the words “Radio Check”, the frequency being used, the identification of the station being called.
options.c: The words “Radio Check”, the frequency being used, the identification of the station being called, the aircraft identification.
options.d: The aircraft identification, the identification of the station being called, the words “Radio Check”.
